---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new permission family or API addition
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want to do**

The user-facing scenario, not the implementation.

**Why Aagya should solve this**

Why does this belong in Aagya rather than in your app code?

**Proposed API**

If you have a sketch, paste it. Otherwise, describe the call site.
